data.reason: The text explicitly states that Section 6.6 and the definition of Permitted Addbacks were amended by Amendment No. 1, dated April 30, 2013, and that determinations for fiscal quarters ending on or after that date give effect to Amendment No. 1. This indicates the amendment is referenced and applied, not merely referenced but not yet applied.
